name: Trackier
description: Mobile measurement partner (MMP) and performance marketing platform for app install attribution with 7-layer fraud detection.

seo.title: Trackier — Mobile Attribution / MMP
seo.meta_description: Trackier: Mobile measurement partner (MMP) and performance marketing platform for app install attribution with 7-layer fraud detection.

when_to_use: App install attribution with 7-layer fraud detection for MMPs
Performance marketing tracking across affiliate and paid channels
Postback configuration for ad network cost and install data

pros: Mobile MMP plus partner marketing in one platform
Popular across India, MENA and SEA markets
Good value compared with AppsFlyer and Adjust
cons: Partner catalog thinner outside emerging markets
Enterprise features and SLAs less rigid
UI density can overwhelm new users
review.verdict: Strong value MMP for emerging markets and partner marketing, but Tier-1 trust and catalog still lead.
review.best_for: App advertisers in India, MENA and SEA wanting combined MMP plus partner marketing at lower cost.
review.not_for: Global enterprises requiring the deepest integration catalog and strongest SLAs.
